note: Sample queue so the page loads live. The builder overwrites this file (or serves ?queue=<file>) with each batch of candidate writing to review.

items.prompt: Marco slides an iced coffee across the counter before you’ve said a word. “Oat, no sugar. I listen.”
items.left: Take it, say nothing, let it land
items.right: “Careful, I could get used to this”
items.voice: He’s remembered her order. Four days in. Somebody get this boy a gold star and a lie detector.

items.prompt: Grace catches your eye across the fire and mouths “you good?” — the first person all night to check.

items.text: A new arrival. Somewhere, three couples just remembered they were never actually that secure.

items.prompt: The others have voted you and your partner the Hideaway. Everyone’s watching to see if you’ll go.
items.left: Keep it to a cup of tea and a chat
items.voice: Bold. The nation has opinions, and half of them are your nan.

items.text: Tonight, the villa watches itself back. Somewhere in that footage is the version of you that thought no one was listening.

items.prompt: “Where’s your head at?” she asks, and means it. The honest answer and the safe answer are not the same sentence.
